title: Repealed
doc_html:
Art. 334.6. Repealed by Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.

            Acts 2013, No. 261, §1; Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
